title: 第2節　廊下の死角
continuityNotes: This is the Sera-side second section of the same apartment-departure incident as scene-001-001-001-sato.
Keep the same apartment corridor, parcel area, and dawn light as the paired image.
Sato must remain an unaware background figure leaving home and must not look toward the incident.
prompt: Create one vertical smartphone-friendly scene illustration for a serial web novel. Do not render any readable text, chapter numbers, talk labels, section labels, captions, subtitles, logos, or UI overlays inside the image. Story context: 第1章　朝の河畔 / 第1話　走る支度. Scene focus: 第2節　廊下の死角 / セラパート. Summary: そのころ、共用廊下の外れでは、宅配業者を装った男が非常階段脇へ折りたたみ式の搬送カートを寄せ、防災盤の陰に薄い発煙器具を差し込もうとしていた。狙いは大げさな火災ではない。短い警… Key beats: そのころ、共用廊下の外れでは、宅配業者を装った男が非常階段脇へ折りたたみ式の搬送カートを寄せ、防災盤の陰に薄い発煙器具を差し込もうとしていた。狙いは大げさな火災ではない。短い警報と煙で人の流れを乱し、部屋から出てきた標的を階段側へ誘導し、そのままカートごと搬出する。朝の住宅街に紛れる工作としては、ずいぶん趣味が悪い。 セラは外階段の影で、その手元を無言で見ていた。銀灰色の髪は低くまとめ、黒白の可愛らしいメイド風ジョギングウェアの上から軽いジャケットを羽織っている。プリーツ入りのランニングスカートの下には機能性レギンス。耳元には猫耳カチューシャ型の警護支援ユニット。一般人には凝ったランニングアクセサリにしか見えないが、彼女にとっては距離と雑音を削る実用品だった。 「玄関を出る前から空気を汚さないでください」 男が振り向くより早く、セラは二歩で間合いを潰した。手首へ細いワイヤーを巻きつけて器具だけを抜き取り、そのまま肘を返す。搬送カートの取っ手へ身体を預けさせ、膝裏を払う。男は声を上げる間もなく崩れ落ち、配送ケースにもたれたまま意識を失った。 Use the supplied character reference images to preserve these canonical looks: sato-jogging: サトー. Keep him as a mature 45-year-old Japanese man with long hair tied in a ponytail, mustache and chin beard, and a lean athletic build. In this novel he must always wear cool-weather jogging clothes, never denim or businesswear. sera-jogging: セラ. Keep her in a maid-inspired running outfit rather than an indoor maid dress, with silver-gray hair, golden eyes, black-and-white technical fabrics, and a clearly visible cat-ear headband support-security unit. Do not turn the outfit into armor or a generic tracksuit. Focus characters: sera-jogging. Keep them clearly readable in the foreground or midground. Continuity notes: This is the Sera-side second section of the same apartment-departure incident as scene-001-001-001-sato. Keep the same apartment corridor, parcel area, and dawn light as the paired image. Sato must remain an unaware background figure leaving home and must not look toward the incident. In every scene of this novel, Sato must keep his canonical face, long ponytail, mustache, chin beard, and lean 45-year-old build, while wearing early-April jogging wear suited to a cool Tokyo morning: a light running jacket or windbreaker, technical long-sleeve top, tapered running pants, and running shoes. In every scene of this novel, Sera must keep her canonical face, silver-gray hair, golden eyes, and cat ears while wearing a maid-inspired jogging outfit built from black-and-white performance fabrics, with apron-line design cues, a short pleated running skirt over leggings, a light jacket, running shoes, and a visible cat-ear headband support-security unit. For Sato-part images, Sato must be the dominant subject and Sera, if visible, must stay clearly separated from him by distance, never adjacent, never shoulder-to-shoulder, and never readable as a companion; she may be visible in the distance or on another part of the path, but not as an extremely tiny speck. For Sera-part images, Sera must be the dominant subject, actively stopping a separate attacker who clearly does not resemble Sato. In every Sera-part image, Sato must remain an unaware background figure, non-combatant, not helping, facing away from the action or looking elsewhere, and not looking toward Sera, the attacker, or the incident. Never let any attacker resemble Sato in face, hair, beard, age, clothing, build, or silhouette. All human figures must have normal anatomy with exactly two arms and two hands.  Create a covert apartment-corridor action image with Sera dominant as she stops a courier-disguised abduction operative near parcel cases, a service panel, or an emergency staircase. Keep Sato smaller in the background just heading out for his run and unaware.
